full_text:
Shangguan Zixiu 上官子脩
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Shangguan Zixiu (上官子脩). Had no choice but to join Shu after booted out by Ma Zun. Shangguan Zixiu was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom and the Shu Kingdom.
